fields.label: Cloud
fields.help: Cloud provider to target. GCP and Azure support coming in a future phase.

fields.label: Region
fields.help: AWS region where all resources in this configuration will be provisioned.

fields.label: Resource name
fields.help: Terraform logical identifier. Referenced elsewhere as aws_instance.<name>.id. Use lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.

fields.label: Instance type
fields.help: EC2 instance size. t2.micro and t3.micro are free-tier eligible.

fields.label: AMI ID
fields.help: Amazon Machine Image ID. Region-specific — find one in AWS Console under EC2 > AMIs, or use the AWS SSM Parameter Store for latest Amazon Linux 2 AMIs.

fields.label: Instance count
fields.help: Number of identical instances to create. Uses Terraform count meta-argument.

fields.label: Name tag
fields.help: Optional. Sets the Name tag visible in the AWS Console EC2 instance list.
